task_completion.description: Navigate to the Federal Reserve website to find the most recent past FOMC meeting
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser window open to federalreserve.gov, specifically showing the FOMC calendar or the monetary policy release page for the January 27-28, 2026 meeting.

task_completion.description: Save the Statement PDF to the target directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'statement.pdf' visible in the directory '/home/ga/Documents/FOMC_Policy/' via a file manager, terminal, or browser download confirmation.

task_completion.description: Save the Implementation Note as a PDF to the target directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'implementation_note.pdf' visible in '/home/ga/Documents/FOMC_Policy/'. Since the original is HTML, look for evidence of the agent using 'Print to PDF' or saving the webpage as a PDF document.

task_completion.description: Record the first full paragraph of the Statement in summary_text.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text file named 'summary_text.txt' in the target directory containing the first full paragraph of the FOMC statement (should contain keywords like 'inflation', 'Committee', 'employment').

task_completion.description: Record the meeting date in metadata.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text file named 'metadata.txt' in the target directory containing the meeting date 'January 27-28, 2026' (or 'January 28, 2026').

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to navigate and download files
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with a graphical web browser (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) to access federalreserve.gov, rather than using terminal commands like curl or wget to bypass UI interaction.

integrity.description: Agent extracted text directly from the source document
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen opening the Statement PDF or webpage and highlighting/copying the first paragraph, rather than typing it from memory or pasting a pre-computed string.

integrity.description: Agent used GUI tools to create and edit the text files
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses a graphical text editor (like Gedit or Mousepad) to create and save 'summary_text.txt' and 'metadata.txt', rather than relying solely on terminal echo/cat commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The most recent past FOMC meeting is January 27-28, 2026. The Statement PDF is available at https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/files/monetary20260128a1.pdf. The Implementation Note is NOT available as a downloadable PDF; it is only an HTML page (https://www.federalreserve.gov/newsevents/pressreleases/monetary20260128a1.htm), meaning the agent must convert it to PDF (e.g., via Print to PDF). The target directory is /home/ga/Documents/FOMC_Policy/. The summary_text.txt must contain the first full paragraph of the statement, which includes keywords: 'inflation', 'Committee', 'target range', 'employment', and 'federal funds rate'. The metadata.txt must contain the date 'January 27-28, 2026' (or 'January 28, 2026').
